timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Cabot reaches Newfoundland
description: John Cabot's voyage under the English crown laid an early foundation for later English claims in the North Atlantic.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: England claims Newfoundland
description: Humphrey Gilbert formally claimed Newfoundland for Elizabeth I, marking one of England's first overseas imperial assertions.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: East India Company is chartered
description: Elizabeth I granted a royal charter to the East India Company, creating a key instrument of British expansion in Asia.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Jamestown is founded
description: The first permanent English settlement in North America was established at Jamestown in Virginia.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Pilgrims found Plymouth Colony
description: The Plymouth settlement strengthened England's colonial presence in New England.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: England captures Jamaica
description: The seizure of Jamaica from Spain gave England a major Caribbean colony.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Battle of Plassey
description: The East India Company's victory at Plassey established British political dominance in Bengal and transformed imperial power in India.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Treaty of Paris expands British holdings
description: Britain emerged from the Seven Years' War with major territorial gains in North America and elsewhere.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: American Revolution begins
description: The rebellion of Britain's North American colonies triggered a major imperial crisis.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Britain recognizes United States independence
description: The Treaty of Paris ended the American Revolution and forced Britain to rethink imperial strategy.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: First Fleet arrives in Australia
description: Britain established a penal colony at Sydney Cove, beginning permanent colonial settlement in Australia.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Slave trade is abolished in the empire
description: Parliament outlawed the British transatlantic slave trade.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Slavery Abolition Act passes
description: Britain moved to abolish slavery in most of its empire.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: British Crown takes direct control of India
description: After the Indian Rebellion, governance passed from the East India Company to the British Crown.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Dominion of Canada is created
description: Confederation formed the Dominion of Canada, a major self-governing unit within the empire.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Victoria becomes Empress of India
description: The Royal Titles Act symbolized the imperial centrality of India within the British Empire.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Britain occupies Egypt
description: British military intervention established long-term control over Egypt and the Suez route.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Empire enters the First World War
description: Britain and its dominions entered a global conflict that drew heavily on imperial manpower and resources.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Statute of Westminster is enacted
description: The statute recognized legislative equality for the self-governing dominions.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: India and Pakistan gain independence
description: The partition of British India marked a decisive turning point in imperial decline.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Suez Crisis accelerates imperial retreat
description: Britain's failed intervention in Egypt exposed diminished great-power capacity.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Year of African decolonization
description: A wave of African independence movements rapidly reduced Britain's colonial holdings.

timeline_description: Major political, military, imperial, and decolonization events in the rise, expansion, and transformation of the British Empire.
title: Hong Kong is handed over to China
description: The transfer of Hong Kong ended one of the last major chapters of formal British imperial rule.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Raid on Lindisfarne
description: The attack on the monastery at Lindisfarne is traditionally treated as the opening of the Viking Age.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Viking raids begin in Ireland
description: Norse raiders struck monastic sites in Ireland, expanding the geographic reach of Viking activity.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Raid on Noirmoutier
description: The attack on Noirmoutier signaled the growing Viking presence on the Frankish coast.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Harald Klak is baptized
description: The baptism of the Danish ruler reflected increasing contact between Viking elites and Christian Europe.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Vikings winter in Ireland
description: Norse groups began overwintering, showing a shift from seasonal raiding to longer occupation.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Vikings raid Seville
description: A major attack on Seville demonstrated Viking ability to project power deep into the Iberian Peninsula.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Norse sailors reach Iceland
description: Scandinavian seafarers began discovering and then settling Iceland.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Great Heathen Army lands in England
description: A large Viking force invaded Anglo-Saxon England and transformed the scale of conflict.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: York is captured
description: The seizure of York created a major Norse political center in England.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Settlement of Iceland accelerates
description: Norse migration made Iceland one of the principal centers of Viking overseas settlement.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Treaty of Wedmore establishes Danish control
description: Alfred of Wessex and Guthrum reached terms that helped define the Danelaw.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Normandy is granted to Rollo
description: The Frankish ruler Charles the Simple granted lands to Rollo, founding Norman power in northern France.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Althing is founded in Iceland
description: The creation of Iceland's assembly reflected the institutional development of a Norse settler society.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Erik the Red reaches Greenland
description: Norse expansion moved farther west into the North Atlantic.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Leif Eriksson sails toward Vinland
description: Norse voyaging brought Vikings to North America around the turn of the millennium.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Iceland adopts Christianity
description: The Althing accepted Christianity, marking a major religious transformation in Norse society.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Sweyn Forkbeard conquers England
description: The Danish king briefly became ruler of England, showing the reach of Viking monarchy.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Cnut becomes king of England
description: Cnut's rule created a North Sea empire linking England, Denmark, and Norway.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Harald Hardrada is defeated at Stamford Bridge
description: The Norwegian king's defeat is often seen as a terminal event of the Viking Age.

timeline_description: Major raids, settlements, voyages, conversions, and political turning points in Viking history from the late eighth to the eleventh century.
title: Battle of Hastings follows the Viking Age
description: William of Normandy, descended from Viking settlers, defeated Harold II at Hastings after the end of the classic Viking Age.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Portuguese firearms reach Japan
description: The arrival of firearms introduced a transformative military technology to Japan.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Oda Nobunaga enters Kyoto
description: Nobunaga's advance began the political unification that preceded Tokugawa rule.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Nobunaga dies at Honno Temple
description: Nobunaga's death shifted leadership of unification to Toyotomi Hideyoshi.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Tokugawa Ieyasu receives Edo domain
description: Ieyasu's transfer to Edo positioned him to build the power base of the future shogunate.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Battle of Sekigahara
description: Ieyasu's victory at Sekigahara established his military supremacy in Japan.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Tokugawa Ieyasu becomes shogun
description: The Tokugawa shogunate was formally established.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Osaka campaign begins
description: The Tokugawa moved against the Toyotomi house in the decisive struggle for national control.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Siege of Osaka ends Toyotomi resistance
description: The destruction of the Toyotomi line consolidated Tokugawa rule.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Alternate attendance is systematized
description: The sankin-kotai system strengthened shogunal control over the daimyo.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Shimabara Rebellion erupts
description: A major uprising highlighted social unrest and the shogunate's hostility to Christianity.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Japan closes most direct ties with Portugal
description: The shogunate completed its exclusion of Portuguese influence and tightened foreign controls.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Keian incident alarms the shogunate
description: A failed plot underscored Tokugawa concern with internal stability.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Genroku era begins
description: The Genroku era became associated with urban culture, commerce, and the arts in Tokugawa Japan.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Tokugawa Yoshimune becomes shogun
description: Yoshimune launched reforms aimed at strengthening the regime's finances and administration.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Kansei Reforms begin
description: The shogunate responded to fiscal and social strain with a major reform program.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Oshio Rebellion breaks out
description: The uprising reflected mounting economic distress and criticism of official responses to famine.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Commodore Perry arrives
description: The United States forced a diplomatic confrontation that destabilized Tokugawa foreign policy.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Convention of Kanagawa is signed
description: Japan agreed to limited opening under pressure from the United States.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Tokugawa Yoshinobu resigns power
description: The last shogun returned governing authority to the emperor, opening the way for regime change.

timeline_description: Major battles, institutions, reforms, foreign encounters, and the collapse of Tokugawa rule in early modern Japan.
title: Meiji Restoration begins
description: Imperial forces overthrew the Tokugawa order and launched a new political era.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Saladin ends the Fatimid Caliphate
description: Ayyubid rule in Egypt created the political setting from which the Mamluk order later emerged.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Louis IX invades Egypt
description: The Seventh Crusade heightened the military importance of the Mamluks in Egypt.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Mamluks seize power in Egypt
description: Mamluk military leaders overthrew Ayyubid authority and established their own regime.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Battle of al-Mansurah
description: Mamluk forces helped defeat the crusader invasion led by Louis IX.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Qutuz becomes sultan
description: Qutuz rose to power as the Mamluk state prepared to confront the Mongols.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Battle of Ayn Jalut
description: The Mamluks defeated the Mongols in Palestine, halting their advance into the eastern Mediterranean.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Baybars becomes sultan
description: Baybars consolidated Mamluk power and expanded the state's military prestige.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Abbasid caliphate is reestablished in Cairo
description: Mamluk rulers enhanced their legitimacy by sheltering a symbolic Abbasid caliph.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Antioch falls to Baybars
description: The conquest of Antioch dealt a major blow to the remaining Crusader states.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Baybars defeats Mongol forces at Elbistan
description: The victory reinforced Mamluk military standing in the region.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Acre is captured
description: The fall of Acre effectively ended major Crusader rule in the Levant.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Black Death reaches Mamluk lands
description: The plague caused severe demographic and economic disruption in Egypt and Syria.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Burji Mamluk period begins
description: The accession of Barquq marked the transition from Bahri to Burji rule.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Timur's campaigns threaten Syria
description: The Mamluk realm faced renewed pressure from a major Central Asian conqueror.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Damascus is sacked by Timur
description: The loss of Damascus exposed Mamluk vulnerability in Syria.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Barsbay becomes sultan
description: Barsbay strengthened central authority and pursued commercial controls in the eastern Mediterranean.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Ottoman conquest of Constantinople reshapes trade
description: The Ottoman victory altered the strategic environment facing the Mamluk Sultanate.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Ottoman-Mamluk War begins
description: Open war broke out between the two major eastern Mediterranean powers.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Ottoman-Mamluk peace is concluded
description: The conflict ended without decisive long-term settlement.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Battle of Marj Dabiq
description: The Ottomans defeated the Mamluks in Syria, beginning the final collapse of the sultanate.

timeline_description: Major dynastic, military, religious, and political events in the rise, rule, and fall of the Mamluk Sultanate in Egypt and Syria.
title: Battle of Ridaniya
description: Ottoman forces defeated the Mamluks near Cairo and ended the independent sultanate.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Humanists study ancient ruins
description: Renaissance antiquarians in Europe began systematic interest in classical inscriptions, monuments, and material remains.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Cyriac of Ancona records ancient sites
description: Cyriac's travels and notes made him an important early observer of classical antiquities.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Great Fire spurs Roman discoveries in London
description: Rebuilding after the fire exposed extensive Roman remains and stimulated antiquarian interest.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Excavations begin at Herculaneum
description: The Bourbon excavations helped spark sustained European fascination with buried ancient cities.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Excavations begin at Pompeii
description: Pompeii became one of the most influential archaeological sites in the history of the field.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Rosetta Stone is discovered
description: The find created a decisive breakthrough for the decipherment of ancient Egyptian writing.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Champollion deciphers hieroglyphs
description: The decipherment transformed Egyptian archaeology into a far more rigorous historical discipline.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Thomsen publishes the Three-Age System
description: C.J. Thomsen formalized the Stone, Bronze, and Iron Ages as a chronological framework.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Stratigraphic geology reshapes archaeology
description: Advances in geology encouraged archaeologists to think in terms of deep time and layered deposits.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Layard begins excavations at Nineveh
description: Excavations in Mesopotamia expanded archaeology beyond the classical Mediterranean.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Heinrich Schliemann excavates Troy
description: The excavation popularized archaeology, despite later criticism of its methods.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Pitt Rivers pioneers systematic field methods
description: His emphasis on careful recording helped professionalize excavation practice.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Flinders Petrie advances seriation
description: Petrie's ceramic sequencing methods improved relative dating and stratigraphic interpretation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Tutankhamun's tomb is discovered
description: Howard Carter's find became one of archaeology's most famous discoveries.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Wheeler-Kenyon method is refined
description: Grid-based excavation and stricter stratigraphic control influenced twentieth-century field archaeology.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Radiocarbon dating is introduced
description: Willard Libby's method transformed chronological dating in archaeology.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Zinjanthropus is announced at Olduvai Gorge
description: Louis and Mary Leakey's discovery reshaped debates on human origins.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Processual archaeology emerges
description: A new theoretical movement emphasized scientific explanation and systems thinking.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: UNESCO World Heritage Convention is adopted
description: The convention linked archaeology more closely to international heritage protection.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: Post-processual archaeology develops
description: Critics of processualism emphasized symbolism, agency, and interpretation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: NAGPRA is enacted in the United States
description: The law reshaped archaeological ethics, collections management, and repatriation practice.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Archaeology
timeline_description: Major discoveries, methods, institutions, and theoretical shifts in the development of archaeology as a modern discipline.
title: LiDAR transforms landscape archaeology
description: Airborne laser scanning revealed hidden settlement and infrastructure patterns at large scale.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: Fleming discovers penicillin
description: Alexander Fleming observed the antibacterial effect of Penicillium, opening the antibiotic era.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: Penicillin is purified for clinical development
description: Howard Florey and Ernst Chain advanced penicillin toward therapeutic use.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: Penicillin enters wartime mass production
description: Large-scale production made antibiotic therapy widely available.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: Fleming warns about resistance
description: In his Nobel lecture, Fleming warned that misuse of penicillin could select resistant microbes.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: Penicillin-resistant Staphylococcus is reported
description: Resistance appeared quickly after widespread penicillin use.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: Vancomycin is discovered
description: A new antibiotic class was introduced as resistance to earlier drugs spread.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: MRSA is identified
description: Methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus emerged soon after methicillin entered use.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: WHO adopts the term essential drugs
description: Global drug policy increasingly linked antibiotic access with rational use.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: Plasmid-mediated resistance gains prominence
description: Researchers increasingly recognized the role of plasmids in spreading resistance genes.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: Hospital infection control expands
description: Rising resistant infections made infection prevention a central health-system priority.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: No new major antibiotic class reaches market for decades
description: The slowdown in antibiotic innovation became a structural problem in resistance control.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: Vancomycin-resistant enterococci are reported
description: VRE added another important resistant hospital pathogen.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: Drug-resistant tuberculosis becomes a major global concern
description: Multidrug-resistant TB drew attention to antimicrobial resistance beyond common hospital bacteria.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: WHO issues global antimicrobial resistance strategy work
description: International coordination intensified as resistance spread.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: Linezolid is approved
description: A rare new antibiotic class reached clinical use against resistant gram-positive infections.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: NDM-1 draws international alarm
description: The spread of the New Delhi metallo-beta-lactamase enzyme highlighted global transfer of resistance genes.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: WHO publishes first global AMR surveillance report
description: The report marked a major step in formalizing global monitoring of resistance.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: WHO adopts the Global Action Plan on AMR
description: Member states endorsed a coordinated strategy to improve surveillance, stewardship, and awareness.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: UN General Assembly holds high-level meeting on AMR
description: Antimicrobial resistance received major political recognition at the United Nations.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: CDC updates U.S. AR threats report
description: The report documented the burden of drug-resistant infections in the United States.

timeline_description: Major discoveries, warnings, resistant pathogens, surveillance frameworks, and global policy milestones in the history of antibiotic resistance.
title: WHO publishes bacterial priority pathogens update
description: The updated list guided research and policy attention toward the most urgent resistant bacteria.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: ARPANET goes live
description: The first ARPANET links created the technical network from which the Internet developed.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: INWG begins protocol coordination
description: Early international work on networking protocols helped establish collaborative technical governance.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: TCP is proposed
description: Vint Cerf and Bob Kahn published the foundational design for internetworking protocols.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: USENET launches
description: Distributed online discussion broadened the participatory culture of the early Internet.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: ARPANET adopts TCP/IP
description: The protocol transition is widely treated as the operational birth of the modern Internet.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: IETF is established
description: The Internet Engineering Task Force became a central body for open technical standard setting.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: IANA functions consolidate around Jon Postel
description: Informal but influential coordination of names and numbers continued through IANA.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: World Wide Web is proposed
description: Tim Berners-Lee's proposal would transform Internet use and later governance debates.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: Internet Society is founded
description: ISOC created an institutional home for Internet standards, education, and policy dialogue.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: National Science Foundation commercializes backbone transition
description: The Internet moved toward wider commercial and global public use.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: WTO begins governing digital trade context
description: The expansion of global trade rules created a new policy environment for Internet governance.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: ICANN is created
description: The Internet Corporation for Assigned Names and Numbers was established to coordinate key identifier systems.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: First phase of WSIS is held
description: The World Summit on the Information Society elevated Internet governance into a global diplomatic issue.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: Tunis Agenda defines Internet governance
description: WSIS produced an influential definition and framework for multistakeholder discussions.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: First Internet Governance Forum meets
description: The IGF began as a recurring multistakeholder platform for debate and coordination.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: OECD adopts Internet policy principles
description: Governments endorsed principles for openness, innovation, and distributed governance.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: NETmundial meeting is held
description: The Sao Paulo meeting issued widely discussed principles for Internet governance and future evolution.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: IANA stewardship transition is completed
description: U.S. oversight of the IANA functions ended, marking a major shift in Internet governance.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: GDPR takes effect in the European Union
description: Privacy regulation in Europe had major global consequences for Internet governance debates.

timeline_description: Major standards, institutions, summits, and policy milestones in the coordination and governance of the global Internet.
title: U.S. issues Declaration for the Future of the Internet
description: Dozens of governments backed principles for an open, free, and trustworthy Internet.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: Dutch found New Amsterdam
description: The origins of Wall Street date to the Dutch settlement at the southern tip of Manhattan.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: Wall is built on Manhattan
description: A defensive wall gave Wall Street its name.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: Federal funding compromise centers finance in New York
description: The Compromise of 1790 strengthened New York's place in national finance.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: Buttonwood Agreement is signed
description: Twenty-four brokers formed the agreement regarded as the origin of the NYSE.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: New York Stock and Exchange Board is organized
description: The exchange adopted a formal constitution and institutional structure.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: Exchange adopts the name New York Stock Exchange
description: The organization took the name by which it became globally known.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: Stock ticker is introduced
description: Ticker technology accelerated price dissemination and trading information.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: NYSE opens Broad Street building
description: The exchange moved into its iconic headquarters at 18 Broad Street.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: Panic of 1907 shakes Wall Street
description: The crisis exposed fragility in U.S. finance and encouraged later central banking reform.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: Federal Reserve Act is passed
description: Creation of the Federal Reserve transformed the financial system centered on Wall Street.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: Wall Street bombing occurs
description: A bomb outside the NYSE killed dozens and shocked the financial district.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: Black Thursday opens the crash
description: The collapse in share prices became a defining Wall Street crisis of the twentieth century.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: Glass-Steagall Act is enacted
description: The law restructured U.S. finance in response to the Depression.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: Securities and Exchange Commission is created
description: The SEC became the principal federal regulator of U.S. securities markets.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: Women are admitted to the trading floor
description: The wartime labor shift opened the floor to women traders and clerical workers.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: NASDAQ launches competition
description: Electronic trading competition changed the wider U.S. market landscape.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: Black Monday hits Wall Street
description: A record one-day market drop exposed the speed and interconnectedness of modern finance.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: NYSE closes after September 11 attacks
description: The closure underscored Wall Street's symbolic and operational importance.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: NYSE merges with Archipelago
description: The deal created NYSE Group as a public company and accelerated exchange modernization.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: Global financial crisis engulfs Wall Street
description: The collapse of major firms and severe market stress defined the deepest crisis since the Depression.

timeline_title: Timeline of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange
timeline_description: Major institutional, architectural, financial, and crisis milestones in the development of Wall Street and the New York Stock Exchange.
title: NYSE is acquired by Intercontinental Exchange
description: The exchange became part of a larger global market operator.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: Venetian Patent Statute is enacted
description: Venice issued one of the earliest general patent laws, foreshadowing modern intellectual property systems.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: Stationers' Company receives royal charter
description: The English crown granted the Stationers' Company power over printing and registration.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: Statute of Monopolies is passed
description: The act limited royal monopolies and became a landmark in patent history.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: Statute of Anne takes effect
description: Often regarded as the first modern copyright law, it recognized authors' rights in published works.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: U.S. Constitution includes copyright and patent clause
description: The Constitution empowered Congress to protect authors and inventors.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: First U.S. Copyright Act is enacted
description: The new republic established a federal copyright regime.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: U.S. Copyright Act is revised
description: Congress extended copyright terms and added musical compositions.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: Paris Convention is adopted
description: The treaty created a major international framework for industrial property.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: Berne Convention is adopted
description: The Berne Convention established a foundational international system for copyright protection.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: United States recognizes foreign copyrights
description: The International Copyright Act ended long-standing exclusion of many foreign authors.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: U.S. Copyright Office is established
description: Congress created a separate Copyright Office within the Library of Congress.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: U.S. Copyright Act of 1909 is enacted
description: The law expanded the categories and administration of copyright in the United States.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: Universal Copyright Convention is signed
description: The convention provided an alternative international copyright framework during the Cold War.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: Rome Convention is adopted
description: The convention strengthened neighboring rights for performers, producers, and broadcasters.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: World Intellectual Property Organization is established
description: WIPO became the principal international body dedicated to intellectual property administration.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: U.S. Copyright Act of 1976 is passed
description: The act modernized American copyright law and remains its central statutory foundation.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: TRIPS Agreement is concluded
description: The WTO agreement integrated intellectual property into the multilateral trading system.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: WIPO Copyright Treaty is adopted
description: The treaty updated copyright protection for the digital environment.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: DMCA is enacted in the United States
description: The Digital Millennium Copyright Act implemented treaty obligations and created new online rules.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: EU Information Society Directive is adopted
description: The directive shaped digital copyright law across the European Union.

timeline_title: Timeline of Copyright and Intellectual Property
timeline_description: Major legal, treaty, and policy milestones in the development of copyright and modern intellectual property protection.
title: Marrakesh Treaty is adopted
description: The treaty improved access to published works for persons who are blind or print disabled.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: Hollywood is founded as a real estate subdivision
description: The name Hollywood entered the map when Harvey Wilcox subdivided land west of Los Angeles.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: Hollywood is incorporated as a municipality
description: The community briefly became its own town before later joining Los Angeles.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: Hollywood merges with Los Angeles
description: Annexation connected Hollywood more fully to the growing city and its infrastructure.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: First studio opens in Hollywood
description: Nestor Film Company established the first permanent movie studio in Hollywood.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: The Squaw Man is produced in Hollywood
description: Cecil B. DeMille's feature helped establish Hollywood as a filmmaking center.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: United Artists is founded
description: Chaplin, Fairbanks, Pickford, and Griffith created a major artist-led studio venture.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: Hollywood Sign is erected
description: The hillside sign became one of the world's most recognizable symbols of the film capital.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: The Jazz Singer popularizes synchronized sound
description: Sound cinema transformed studio production and moviegoing.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: First Academy Awards are held
description: The Academy Awards became Hollywood's signature ceremony of prestige and promotion.
source_publisher: Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: Motion Picture Production Code is adopted
description: The code established industry rules for content, though strong enforcement came later.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: Hays Code is strictly enforced
description: The Production Code Administration began rigorous censorship of studio releases.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: Gone with the Wind and The Wizard of Oz define studio-era spectacle
description: A landmark year showcased Hollywood's technical and commercial power.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: Paramount decision breaks studio control
description: The Supreme Court forced studios to divest theater chains, weakening vertical integration.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: Singin' in the Rain celebrates and satirizes early Hollywood
description: The film became a defining reflection on Hollywood's transition to sound.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: MPAA ratings system replaces the Hays Code
description: Hollywood moved from centralized censorship to age-based film ratings.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: Jaws launches the summer blockbuster era
description: Wide release and heavy marketing reshaped studio economics.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: Star Wars accelerates franchise filmmaking
description: The film reinforced effects-driven blockbuster strategy and merchandising.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: Disney's The Lion King crowns animation's commercial revival
description: Family animation became a major pillar of Hollywood studio strategy.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: The Lord of the Rings era expands franchise filmmaking
description: Large-scale franchise production and global box office strategy intensified.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: Avatar ushers in a new 3-D boom
description: Digital effects and premium-format exhibition reshaped blockbuster production.

timeline_description: Major industrial, technological, legal, cultural, and labor milestones in the rise and transformation of Hollywood.
title: Writers and actors strike across Hollywood
description: Parallel labor actions by writers and performers disrupted film and television production.
